candidate_command_template: rm -rf /tmp/vabench-visible/runs/{case} /tmp/vabench-visible/evas-output/{case} && mkdir -p /tmp/vabench-visible/runs/{case} && cp public/submission/testbench.scs /tmp/vabench-visible/runs/{case}/testbench.scs && ln -sfn "$(pwd)/public/task/{dut_root}" /tmp/vabench-visible/runs/{case}/dut && evas simulate /tmp/vabench-visible/runs/{case}/testbench.scs -o /tmp/vabench-visible/evas-output/{case} --spectre-strict
